zh.lifeSummary: 當Saire Sutton於1244年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾德內斯時，他的父親Saire de Sutton11241歲，母親Joanna d'Eyncourt29歲。他於1266年與Anne de Ros在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1292年3月31日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾塞頓 奧 特倫特享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Saire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, probably a borrowing of the Old Norse byname Skári ‘sea-mew’. It has sometimes been Anglicized as Zachary.

en.lifeSummary: When Saire Sutton was born in 1244, in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Saire de Sutton, was 11241 and his mother, Joanna d'Eyncourt, was 29. He married Anne de Ros in 1266, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 31 March 1292, in Sutton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Saire Sutton est né en 1244, à Holderness, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Saire de Sutton, avait 11241 ans et sa mère, Joanna d'Eyncourt, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Anne de Ros en 1266, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 31 mars 1292, à Sutton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1266 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Anne de Ros geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 31. März 1292 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Sutton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Saire Sutton è nato il nel 1244 nel Holderness, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Saire de Sutton, aveva 11241 anni e il suo madre, Joanna d'Eyncourt, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Anne de Ros nel 1266, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 31 marzo 1292, nel Sutton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Saire Suttonが1244年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホールデルネスで生まれた時，父Saire de Suttonは11241歳，母Joanna d'Eyncourtは29歳であった。1266年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドでAnne de Rosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1292年3月31日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスットオン オン トレントで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Saire Sutton(이)가 1244년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 홀더네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Saire de Sutton(은)는 11241세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna d'Eyncourt(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1266년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 Anne de Ros(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1292년 3월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 수턴  트렌트에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Anne de Ros em 1266, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Sutton On Trent, Nottinghamshire, Englan: суттон он трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Saire Sutton родился в 1244 г. в местности холдирнесс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Saire de Sutton было 11241 год, а матери, которую звали Joanna d'Eyncourt, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne de Ros в 1266 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 31 марта 1292 г. в местности суттон он трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
